code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut start = 0 - 1
while i < n
  let b = string.byte_at(input, i)
  let is_ws = match b
  when Some(c)
    c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
  when None
    true
  end
  if is_ws
    if start >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        sum = sum + v
        count = count + 1
      when None
        ()
      end
      start = 0 - 1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start >= 0
  let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    sum = sum + v
    count = count + 1
  when None
    ()
  end
end
let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
